prompt_text: Compare Apollo.io and ZoomInfo for build targeted prospect lists
response:
# Apollo.io vs ZoomInfo: Prospect List Building Comparison

## Data Quality & Coverage

| Factor | Apollo.io | ZoomInfo |
|--------|-----------|----------|
| **Database Size** | 250M+ contacts, 30M+ companies | 150M+ contacts, 12M+ companies |
| **Data Accuracy** | ~95% email verification | ~98% (highest in industry) |
| **Update Frequency** | Real-time verification | Weekly/monthly updates |
| **International Coverage** | Good (100+ countries) | US-focused, limited international |

## List Building Features

**Apollo.io Strengths:**
- More flexible filtering options
- Advanced search by: technographics, firmographics, intent signals
- Boolean search capabilities
- Easier to build niche lists
- Real-time email verification

**ZoomInfo Strengths:**
- Superior B2B intent data
- Company hierarchies and org charts
- Advanced AI-powered insights
- Better for enterprise-level targeting
- Built-in buying signals/triggers

## Pricing

| Plan | Apollo.io | ZoomInfo |
|------|-----------|----------|
| **Entry** | $49/month | $4,165/month (est.) |
| **Mid-tier** | $165/month | Enterprise pricing |
| **Best for** | SMB/startup | Enterprise |

## Ease of Use

**Apollo.io**: 
- Intuitive interface
- Shorter learning curve
- Quick exports (CSV, API)

**ZoomInfo**:
- More complex workflow
- Steeper learning curve
- Powerful but requires training

## Integration Ecosystem

- **Apollo.io**: Zapier, HubSpot, Salesforce, Outreach
- **ZoomInfo**: Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, Outreach (more enterprise-focused)

## Winner by Use Case

| Scenario | Winner | Why |
|----------|--------|-----|
| **Startups/SMBs** | Apollo.io | Affordable, intuitive, sufficient data |
| **Enterprise Sales** | ZoomInfo | Superior intent data, accuracy |
| **Budget-conscious** | Apollo.io | 10x cheaper entry point |
| **Intent-driven outreach** | ZoomInfo | Best-in-class signals |
| **International expansion** | Apollo.io | Better non-US coverage |

## Bottom Line

- **Choose Apollo.io** if you need affordable, flexible list-building for SMB/mid-market prospecting
- **Choose ZoomInfo** if budget allows and you need enterprise-grade intent signals and highest accuracy

Consider starting with **Apollo.io's free tier** to test before committing.
